cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why Ms. Leibfried asked the author to recite a passage in front of the class. The choices are A to D. First, I need to go back to the text to recall the relevant part. The author mentions that the big project was a book report to be read aloud, but Ms. Leibfried suggested she do something "a little different" and recite a passage from "The Bell Jar." The context around this is that the author was shy, the only non-white student, and felt out of place. Ms. Leibfried noticed her interest in reading and writing and helped her feel less shy.
